Five Year Suspension on Consent Retroactive to 08/10/2022; Criminal conviction of 15 counts of possession of child pornography; Remorse, cooperation and no prior discipline mitigate.

Disbarred Retroactive to July 11, 2019; Failure to segregate and safeguard client funds in IOLTA; Failure to maintain records; Deposit of non-client funds into IOLTA; Failure to disburse client funds; dishonest and deceitful conduct; Prior Disbarment, lack of remorse and failure to accept responsibility for misconduct.
Disbarred on Consent; Criminal Conviction of four counts of promoting prostitution.
Temporary Suspension - Rule214(d)(5)

Six Month Suspension with Six Month Probation; Misrepresentations; Frivolous filings; False statements; Incompetence; No prior discipline, regret, remorse, history of service to others, voluntary remedial actions to correct practice issues mitigate.

One Year and One Day Stayed Suspension and Two-Year Probation with Conditions on Consent; Neglect and abandonment of numerous clients; False statements to the Courts; Failure to appear; Guilty plea to harassment; Sincere remorse, cooperation, mental health treatment, and no prior discipline mitigate.

Public Reprimand on Consent for violations of Pa.R.P.C. 1.5(e), 5.1(a), 5.3(c)(1) and (2), 7.2(h), 1.16(d); Failure to properly monitor all nonlawyer staff; Failed to ensure that all advanced legal fees were refunded; Prior Discipline.
Reinstatement Granted from one year and one day suspension; Rehabilitation, acceptance of responsibility and sincere contrition; Burden met.

Two Year Suspension; Criminal conviction of two counts of disorderly conduct and engaged in an impermissible concurrent conflict of interest; Failure to comprehend the nature of her misconduct, accept responsibility, demonstrate remorse and lack of credibility aggravate. No prior discipline.

Public Reprimand for violations of Pa.R.P.C. 1.5, 1.15, 8.4 and Pa.R.D.E. 219; Failure to timely provide a written fee agreement; mishandling of IOLTA funds without fraudulent intent; failure to provide a prompt accounting upon request by client; failure to provide business operating account on ARO form; No prior discipline.
Reinstatement Granted from One Year and One Day Suspension on Consent; Rehabilitation; Character witnesses; Burden met.

Three Year Suspension on Consent; Misleading and false statements to clients in at least 15 separate matters concerning settlement amounts over the course of two years; False statements to litigation lenders; Remorse, cooperation and no prior discipline.
Reinstatement Granted from Disbarment on Consent based on felony conviction of wire fraud; Rehabilitation; Character witnesses; Restitution; Burden met.

Three Year Suspension on Consent Retroactive to June 6, 2024, with one year to be served and the remaining suspension period is stayed, and Respondent is placed on probation for a period of two years subject to conditions as outlined in the order; Criminal convictions of two separate DUI’s and Endangering the Welfare of a Child; Engaged in misconduct in two client matters involving lack of diligence, failure to communicate or adequately explain matters to a client in which neither client suffered harm or loss of any legal rights. No prior discipline, rehabilitation, and the unlikelihood of recidivism mitigate.
Five Year Suspension on Consent Retroactive To April 30, 2025; Guilty Plea to Sexual Abuse of Children - Possession of Child Pornography; No prior discipline and other mitigating factors.

Two Year Suspension on Consent; Misconduct in six separate client matters involving neglect, severe communication deficiencies, and misrepresentations to clients regarding the status of their matters; No prior discipline.
One Year and One Day Suspension on Consent; Incompetence and Lack of diligence and promptness in numerous client matters; Cooperation, Remorse and no prior discipline mitigate.

Disbarred on Consent; Engaged in misconduct by sending suggestive and sexually explicit text message to client while representing her as Asst. Public Defender and encouraging her to delete messages; Dishonesty, fraud, deceit, and misrepresentation.

One Year and One Day Suspension; Failure to properly maintain settlement funds; Failure to promptly distribute settlement funds; Misrepresentation; Failure to cooperate; Lack of cooperation, his deficiencies in defending his own disciplinary matter, failure to take the proceedings seriously and failure to assume any responsibility or exhibit any insight or remorse aggravate; No prior discipline.

Two Year Probation on Consent with Practice Monitor; Misconduct in nine separate client matters between 2021 and 2024, where he engaged in incompetence, neglect, lack of communication, misrepresentation, and abandonment of some clients. Admission of misconduct and cooperation mitigate; Prior discipline aggravates.

Two Year Suspension; Engaged in misconduct by filing frivolous filings and engaging in prohibited ex parte communications; Failed to respond to ODC; Uncooperative; Failure to accept responsibility; Lack of remorse; Blame shifting; Disrespect for the disciplinary system; Unprofessional conduct; No prior discipline.

Public Reprimand on Consent for violations of RPC 1.1, 1.3, 1.4, 1.5, 1.15, 1.16, 8.1, and 8.4; Lack of competence; Lack of diligence; Failure to communicate; Mishandled entrusted funds; Failure to inform new client that he does not have professional liability coverage; Failure to expedite litigation consistent with the interests of clients; Prior discipline and Mitigation factors.
Reinstatement Granted from Disbarment on Consent; Remorse, recovery and rehabilitation; Credible character witnesses; Expert testimony on rehabilitation; Burden met.
Disbarred on Consent; Criminal Conviction of one count of child sexual abuse material in the Court of Common Pleas of Philadelphia.
Reinstatement Granted from four year suspension; Burden met.

One Year and One Day Suspension on Consent; Misconduct in two matters; Client neglect; Failure to respond; Lack of communication; Criminal conviction of DUI; Acceptance of responsibility, remorse, cooperation and no prior discipline mitigate.

Disbarred on Consent; Criminal Conviction of three counts of Theft by Failure to Make Required Disposition of Funds Received; three counts of Dealing in Proceeds of Unlawful Activities, Forgery,  Theft by Failure to Make Required Disposition of Funds Received.

Public Reprimand for violations of Pa.R.P.C. 1.1, 1.3, 1.4, and 5.1; Failure to handle his client's case with competence and diligence and failed to keep his client informed about the status of his matter; Prior Discipline aggravates.
Disbarred on Consent Retroactive to July 14, 2023; Financial improprieties relating to his IOLTA account.
Reinstatement Granted from Three Year Suspension on Consent with One Year to be Served.
Disbarment on Consent
